enrichment.summary: Kyle announces a Patreon to raise $10,000 for an infinity pool, which he wants so he can exercise while doing daily audiobook video content. He explains his financial situation: $100/year from Google AdSense, possible demonetization, and $15,000 in credit card debt, while noting his analytics suggest he should be earning much more.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Worth trying; will let God decide the outcome

stances.topic: daily audiobook videos vs website work
stances.position: They conflict — doing both at full capacity isn't feasible in current setup
Making only $100/year from YouTube, possibly demonetized, which is far below what analytics suggest

transcript.text: Hello, Patreon video. I figured I'd do a Patreon video. I was thinking about this a long time.
I'm going to try to keep it to three minutes. That's the length of the Patreon video.
So, I don't know, you know.
I'm thinking about doing exercise, but to do that, I want the infinity pool, and that's 10,000 bucks.
So, I figured I'd do the Patreon video, and if I get the 10,000 bucks, I'll do the infinity pool.
Okay, and so then I can do the enduro school and bike school, like I see on my website, and I can, you know.
I do videos every single day about audio books that I listen to, but the problem is, if I do that, then I'm going to, I'm not going to, I'm going to do 90% less work on my website.
But, so, because it's conflicting, you know.
I can't work on my website and work on my computer and stuff at the same time.
Not in the state that it is.
But if I get the infinity pool, I'll probably, yeah, I think I will just reduce it that much.
But, you know, maybe less.
It is possible to have a balance of life, you know.
But, I need the money.
I don't have the money.
I have, I got my first check from Google on the 21st, $100 on the 21st of this month.
And the last time I got a check was the 21st of this month last year, exactly one year ago.
So, I make 100 bucks a year.
Yeah, but my website says I should make $1,000 a year on my analytics.
I mean, $1,000 a week, so I don't know.
I'll have to look into that.
But I'm not making any money out.
I think I may be demonetized, so that's why I don't have any money.
I'm like $15,000 in credit card debt paying off, you know, my big TV and stuff like that.
So, I have the Patreon, and then I'm going to put, I put the Patreon in my website.
So, we'll, yeah, just put it out there, you know.
I'll just let God decide what I do because I don't really care either way because I do want to finish my website.
Okay, so that's pretty much three minutes.
Patreon video compounds.
Peace out.
